__comment: M12: (likeCount DESC, createdAt DESC) for /gallery popular sort. M13: (ownerUid ASC, createdAt DESC) for /u/[username] profile skins query. Single-field descending indexes on createdAt + likeCount + ownerUid are auto-created by Firestore. Tag filtering is client-side (M12 constraint), so no (tags, createdAt) index is needed.
